name: Air / Solo Frosted Glass Expander (14-19)
summary: The Air / Solo Frosted Glass Expander (14-19) allows for the customisation of 14mm downstems to fit 19mm glass-on-glass connectors.
description: The Air / Solo Frosted Glass Expander (14-19) allows for the customisation of 14mm downstems to fit 19mm glass-on-glass connectors. This product is compatible with multiple Arizer vaporiser models, including Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2 vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
